# ORION Events

Fonte: `app/events/catalog.py`.

## Catalogo

| Evento | Direcao | Transporte | Persistido | Descricao |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `connection.opened` | WebSocket -> SQLite | internal audit | sim | Records the opening of a WebSocket connection. |
| `connection.closed` | WebSocket -> SQLite | internal audit | sim | Records the closing of a WebSocket connection. |
| `client.message` | client -> server -> connected clients | WebSocket and internal audit | sim | Carries the baseline client message broadcast. |
| `system.ready` | server -> client | WebSocket | nao | Confirms that the baseline WebSocket connection is ready. |

## `connection.opened`

| Campo | Tipo | Obrigatorio | Descricao |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `connection_id` | `string` | sim | Ephemeral connection identifier. |

## `connection.closed`

| Campo | Tipo | Obrigatorio | Descricao |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `connection_id` | `string` | sim | Ephemeral connection identifier. |

## `client.message`

| Campo | Tipo | Obrigatorio | Descricao |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `payload` | `JSON object or normalized text` | sim | Baseline message payload. |

## `system.ready`

| Campo | Tipo | Obrigatorio | Descricao |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `connectionId` | `string` | sim | Ephemeral connection identifier. |
| `message` | `string` | sim | Human-readable connection status. |
| `connections` | `integer` | sim | Current local connection count. |
